name: Telos Beacon Protocol — Codex Cloud Agent Environment
postCreateCommand: bash docs/beacon/cloud/postcreate.sh || echo 'postcreate.sh missing — using inline defaults' && pip install --no-input --quiet pyyaml jsonschema cloudflare && pip install --no-input --quiet -e docs/beacon/cloud 2>/dev/null || true && python -c 'import json; json.load(open("docs/beacon/beacon-schema.json")); print("beacon-schema.json: valid")'
postStartCommand: echo 'Telos Beacon Protocol devcontainer ready. Start at docs/logos/telos.md.'

_beacon_meta.purpose: Codex Cloud (https://developers.openai.com/codex/cloud/environments) — compatible devcontainer for Telos Beacon Protocol agents. See AGENTS.md for the invocation contract.
_beacon_meta.primary_audience: Codex Cloud agents invoking the Beacon by reading docs/logos/ and docs/beacon/ and re-emitting via Workers /emit.
